fields.helpText: This field represents 2 character code for HBHC Period of Service.  Valid entries are '00' thru '05', '07' thru '10', and 'X '.  (Note 'X' is followed by space character.)  All one digit numeric entries must have leading zero.
This field represents HBHC Period of Service text.  Field allows for 3-30 characters of free text.
